concept: Ally / One Who Joins the Collective Self
description: One who joins another's struggle for justice as their own. An ally stands with a community, aligning their personal self with the collective.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'we' (the collective) and 'mi' (the inner self). The word's structure literally means 'the collective self.' This powerfully defines an ally as someone who has integrated the collective's struggle into their own sense of self.
